records.ety: [L. Ilias, -adis, Gr. <?/, <?/ (sc. <?/), fr. <?/, <?/, Ilium, the city of Ilus, a son of Tros, founder of Ilium, which is a poetical name of Troy.]

defs: A celebrated Greek epic poem, in twenty-four books, on the destruction of Ilium, the ancient Troy. The Iliad is ascribed to Homer.
